response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of full-stack experience spanning TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Kubernetes, plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work that directly matches a rare JD requirement. Strong testing culture (TDD, test-library authorship, testing workshops) and demonstrated architecture ownership fit the role well. Main gaps are the absence of Nest.js and Kotlin, limited recent Java, and heavier Ember than React history, but these are learnable given the depth elsewhere.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js experience with React, MongoDB, and AWS in production at scale
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development experience, directly matching the JD's AI requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing framework authorship, and community teaching
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience listed in the primary/secondary stack
Frontend history leans heavily on Ember.js; React exposure appears limited to one recent role
Significant time invested in niche DLang ecosystem may mean less depth in the JVM stack the team uses
